question: What is CodeAlpha?
answer: CodeAlpha is an innovative technology company dedicated to empowering developers and businesses with cutting-edge AI solutions and internship programs.

question: What services does CodeAlpha offer?
answer: CodeAlpha offers AI development services, internship programs, software solutions, machine learning consulting, and developer training programs.

question: Who founded CodeAlpha?
answer: CodeAlpha was founded by a team of passionate AI engineers and educators committed to making AI education accessible to all developers.

question: What is CodeAlpha's mission?
answer: CodeAlpha's mission is to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world AI development by providing hands-on internship experiences.

question: How do I contact CodeAlpha support?
answer: You can reach our support team via email at support@codealpha.tech or through the live chat on our website. Our team responds within 24 hours.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM (PKT). For urgent issues, you can use our 24/7 automated support portal.

question: Where is CodeAlpha located?
answer: CodeAlpha is headquartered in Pakistan and operates globally through remote teams and online platforms.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and you'll receive a reset link within 5 minutes.

question: How do I create a new account?
answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button on our homepage. Fill in your name
column4: and password. Verify your email address and your account will be ready to use.

question: Can I change my email address?
answer: Yes. Log into your account and navigate to Settings > Profile then click 'Change Email'. You'll need to verify the new email address before the change takes effect.

question: How do I update my profile information?
answer: Go to Settings > Profile and click Edit. You can update your name
column5: and contact details. Click Save when done.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and Amex, as well as PayPal, bank transfers, JazzCash, and EasyPaisa for Pakistan-based clients.

question: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
answer: Go to Dashboard > Billing > Upgrade Plan. Choose your desired plan and complete the payment process. Your upgrade takes effect immediately.

question: Can I get a refund for my payment?
answer: Yes. We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all plans. Contact our billing team at billing@codealpha.tech within 30 days of your purchase.

question: How do I download my payment invoice?
answer: Log into your account and go to Settings > Billing > Invoice History. You can download any invoice as a PDF from there.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your access will remain active until the end of the current billing period.

question: What is the CodeAlpha internship program about?
answer: The CodeAlpha internship program is a structured 1-month program where students complete AI and ML projects, gain hands-on experience, and receive a certificate upon completion.

question: How do I apply for the CodeAlpha internship?
answer: Visit our website at codealpha.tech and fill out the internship application form. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email within 5 business days.

question: Is the CodeAlpha internship paid?
answer: The CodeAlpha internship is currently unpaid but provides a verified certificate, LinkedIn recommendation, and portfolio-worthy projects for your resume.

question: What tasks are assigned during the internship?
answer: Interns work on real-world AI projects such as FAQ chatbots, object detection systems, music generation tools, language translation applications, and more.

question: How do I submit my internship tasks?
answer: Submit your completed tasks via the intern portal or email them to internship@codealpha.tech with your intern ID and task title in the subject line.

question: What is the deadline for internship task submission?
answer: All tasks must be submitted before the last day of your internship month. Extensions are not typically granted unless approved by your supervisor.

question: What certificate will I receive after internship?
answer: You will receive a digitally signed and verifiable certificate of completion from CodeAlpha which can be shared directly to LinkedIn.

question: How long is the internship program?
answer: The CodeAlpha internship program runs for one month with flexible hours allowing students to complete tasks at their own pace.

question: What technologies are used in the internship projects?
answer: Interns use Python, Streamlit, OpenCV, RapidFuzz, Pandas, and other modern Python libraries depending on their assigned tasks.

question: What is RapidFuzz used for?
answer: RapidFuzz is a fast fuzzy string matching library for Python. In this chatbot it compares your question against FAQ entries to find the most similar answer.

question: What is Streamlit?
answer: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web applications for data science and machine learning with very minimal code.

question: What is fuzzy string matching?
answer: Fuzzy string matching finds strings that are approximately equal rather than exactly equal. It handles typos

question: What programming language is used in this chatbot?
answer: This chatbot is built entirely in Python 3.14 and uses Streamlit for the user interface and RapidFuzz for intelligent FAQ matching.

question: What is semantic similarity?
answer: Semantic similarity measures how alike two pieces of text are in meaning. Higher similarity means the texts convey similar ideas even with different wording.

question: What is natural language processing?
answer: Natural language processing or NLP is a branch of AI that enables computers to understand
column4: and respond to human language in a meaningful way.

question: How does the FAQ matching work in this chatbot?
answer: Your question is normalized and compared against all FAQ entries using multiple RapidFuzz scoring algorithms. The best match above a confidence threshold is returned as the answer.

question: What is WRatio in RapidFuzz?
answer: WRatio is a weighted combination scorer in RapidFuzz that applies several fuzzy matching algorithms and returns the best weighted result. It is the most balanced general-purpose scorer.

question: How does the confidence score work in this chatbot?
answer: The confidence score shows how closely your question matched a FAQ entry. Green badge means 75% or higher and the answer is reliable. Yellow means 55 to 74 percent and is the closest match found. Red means below 55% and no good match was found.

question: Can I export my chat history?
answer: Yes. Click the Export button in the sidebar. Your full conversation with all timestamps will be downloaded as a text file.

question: How do I clear the chat history?
answer: Click the Clear Chat button in the sidebar. This removes all messages from the current session. Previously exported files are not affected.

question: Does this chatbot support voice input?
answer: Yes. Click the microphone button at the bottom right of the screen to speak your question. The chatbot will transcribe your speech and respond automatically. This requires Chrome browser.

question: Does this chatbot support voice output?
answer: Yes. Enable the Voice Output toggle in the sidebar and the bot will read its responses aloud using your browser's built-in text to speech engine.

question: Can I search the FAQ database directly?
answer: Yes. Go to the FAQ Search tab in the sidebar to browse and search all available questions by keyword or category. Click any question to send it to the chat.

question: How many FAQ questions are available?
answer: The chatbot comes preloaded with over 60 FAQ entries across multiple categories including About

question: How do I add new FAQ questions?
answer: Open the faq.csv file in the project folder and add a new row with the question and answer in the correct columns. Restart the app to load the updated data.

question: What is the typing animation in this chatbot?
answer: The chatbot displays responses character by character to simulate a natural human-like typing effect making the conversation feel more engaging.

question: How do I run this chatbot project?
answer: Install the dependencies first by running: py -m pip install -r requirements.txt — then start the app by running: py -m streamlit run app.py — The app will open automatically in your browser.

question: What Python version is required for this project?
answer: This project requires Python 3.10 or higher. It has been developed and tested on Python 3.14 on Windows 10 and 11.

question: How do I install the project dependencies?
answer: Run this command in your terminal inside the project folder: py -m pip install -r requirements.txt — This will install streamlit

question: Does this project work on Windows?
answer: Yes. This project is fully compatible with Windows 10 and Windows 11. No Docker or virtual machines are required.

question: Does this project work on macOS or Linux?
answer: Yes. The project works on macOS and Linux. Use python3 instead of py when running commands on those systems.

question: Do I need to install TensorFlow or PyTorch?
answer: No. This project does not use TensorFlow
column5: or NumPy. It only requires streamlit

question: Why is the chatbot giving wrong answers?
answer: This can happen if your question is very different from the available FAQs. Try rephrasing your question using keywords related to the topic you want help with.

question: Why is the app not starting?
answer: Make sure all dependencies are installed by running py -m pip install -r requirements.txt and that you are running the command from inside the project folder.

question: Why is my chat not being saved?
answer: Check that the data folder exists in the project directory. The chatbot creates it automatically on first launch. Make sure you have write permission in the project folder.

question: How do I fix a module not found error?
answer: Run py -m pip install -r requirements.txt to install all missing packages. Make sure you are using the same Python environment where streamlit is installed.

question: What should I do if the page shows an error?
answer: Try refreshing the browser. If the error persists check the terminal where you ran streamlit for detailed error messages and contact support if needed.

question: What is CodeAlpha's AI internship task list?
answer: The four main internship tasks are: Task 1 is Language Translation Tool, Task 2 is AI FAQ Chatbot, Task 3 is AI Music Generation, and Task 4 is Object Detection System.

question: How do I become a good software engineer?
answer: To become a strong software engineer, focus on mastering data structures, algorithms, clean code practices, version control with Git, and building real projects consistently.

question: What skills do I need to learn for AI and machine learning?
answer: To learn AI and machine learning, focus on Python programming, mathematics including linear algebra and statistics, libraries like scikit-learn and pandas, and build hands-on projects.

question: How can I improve my programming skills?
answer: Practice coding daily on platforms like LeetCode and HackerRank. Build personal projects
column5: and review other people's code regularly.

question: What is a good career path in technology?
answer: Popular technology career paths include software engineering

question: How do I prepare for a technical job interview?
answer: Study data structures and algorithms, practice coding problems daily, prepare system design basics, review your projects, and do mock interviews with peers or platforms like Pramp.

question: What is object detection?
answer: Object detection is a computer vision technique that identifies and locates objects within images or video frames. It draws bounding boxes around detected objects and labels them.

question: What is a language translation tool?
answer: A language translation tool converts text from one language to another using translation APIs or models. It helps bridge communication gaps across different languages.

question: What is AI music generation?
answer: AI music generation uses machine learning models to compose original music automatically. It can generate melodies
column4: and harmonies in various styles without human input.

question: What is a chatbot?
answer: A chatbot is a software application that simulates human conversation. It can answer questions
column4: and complete tasks using rule-based logic or AI-powered matching.
